Bus Timings

F15 Bus Schedule Onpassive Terminus to Bartawi Camps and Return

May 3, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F15 is a key public transport service operating in Dubai, designed to connect various important industrial and residential areas with ease. It runs a circular route between Onpassive Terminus and Bartawi Camps, providing comprehensive coverage of several key stops along the way.

Route Name F15
Route Description Onpassive Terminus - Bartawi Camps - Onpassive Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 5-8 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 04:12 to 01:18 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F15

Bus F15 Route in Dubai

From Onpassive Terminus From Bartawi Camps

Bus F15 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or follow this link for F15 Bus Timings.

Also See: Complete Route and Stop Details for Sharjah Bus 15

Bus Ticket Price

As of the latest update, the standard fare for Bus F15 is AED 3. This affordable fare makes it a cost-effective option for those needing to commute within the route or travel between different stops. Additionally, the reliable service and frequent schedules ensure that passengers can travel comfortably and conveniently.

Bus Booking

Tickets for Bus F15 can be purchased directly at bus stations or on board the bus. For added convenience, Dubai’s RTA (Roads and Transport Authority) offers online services through the RTA website and mobile app. Through the app, you can check schedules, route maps, and manage your travel plans effectively. Online booking is not required for this service, but having the RTA app can provide real-time updates and ticketing information.

Bus Route

The Bus F15 route covers the following stops:

  1. Onpassive Terminus

  2. Khaleej Times

  3. Latifa Bin Hamdan Street

  4. Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate, 1

  5. Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate, 2

  6. Al Khail Gate, 3

  7. Emirates Housing Al Khail Gate

  8. Majid Industries

  9. Metal Coating

  10. Emirates Industries

  11. Emirates Printing Press

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. ETA Steel Works

  2. Bartawi Camps

  3. Rostamani Steel Mills

  4. Joton Paints

  5. AST Company

  6. Oasis Village

  7. New Housing Junction

  8. Latifa Bint Hamdan Street 2

  9. Galadari Printing & Publishing

  10. Queen Palace Factory

  11. Emirates Gas Factory

  12. Honda Training Center

  13. Onpassive Terminus

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus F15 route in Dubai primarily serves industrial and residential areas, with limited direct access to prominent tourist attractions.

  1. Emirates Printing Press: While not a tourist destination, it’s an interesting spot for those interested in the printing and publishing industry.

  2. Oasis Village: A residential area with a traditional feel, offering a glimpse of local Dubai life.

  3. Honda Training Center: Though primarily an educational facility, it reflects Dubai’s focus on skill development and innovation.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus F15 from Onpassive Terminus to Bartawi Camps offers a unique journey through Dubai’s industrial and residential areas. Starting at Onpassive Terminus, the route takes passengers through several bustling parts of the city, showcasing the blend of modern infrastructure and traditional settings.

As the bus passes through the city, passengers can observe Dubai’s rapid urban development and get a glimpse of life in the outskirts. On the return journey, you can enjoy views of local landmarks and experience the dynamic rhythm of Dubai’s expanding urban landscape.

Read More: Route and Stops for Dubai Bus N55 (Overnight)

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, traveling to Bartawi Camps, the furthest destination on the F15 bus route starting from Onpassive Terminus, becomes seamless and convenient. The fare for this journey ranges from AED 22 to AED 26, ensuring a comfortable and reliable way to reach your destination. Whether you’re heading to Bartawi Camps for leisure or business, Careem offers a straightforward solution to get you there efficiently.

In conclusion, Bus F15 is a key transport link in Dubai, connecting industrial zones, residential areas, and key institutions. Offering frequent service and an affordable fare of AED 3, it’s a practical choice for daily commutes and city exploration. The bus’s extensive route coverage ensures convenient access to various destinations, making it an invaluable part of the city’s public transit network. For the latest schedules and ticketing details, the RTA app is a helpful resource, ensuring a smooth and reliable travel experience.

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 3, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
